summary: Tested new features: Customer Loyalty Program, Smart Stock Alerts, and Supplier Payment Deletion Bug Fix. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all new features loading correctly.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: StockPage.jsx has minor HTML nesting warnings in console (span inside tbody/tr) - consider cleaning up JSX structure if time permits
seed_data_creation: Test customer 'Test Customer' has 625 loyalty points (Silver tier). Widget A has smart alert (critical - out of stock).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty program is enabled (1 point per SAR, SAR 0.1 per point, min 100 pts to redeem). Tiers: Bronze (0), Silver (500), Gold (1000), Platinum (2500). Smart Stock Alerts at /api/stock/smart-alerts with velocity-based predictions. Supplier payment deletion bug fix verified - deleting cash/bank payment properly increases supplier credit balance back.

loyalty_settings.details: Settings include enabled, points_per_sar, sar_per_point, min_redeem_points, welcome_bonus, tier_levels (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum)

loyalty_leaderboard.details: Returns leaderboard with customer rankings, total_points_issued, total_points_redeemed, tier info

customer_loyalty_info.details: Returns points_balance, points_earned_total, points_redeemed_total, current_tier, next_tier, points_value_sar, recent_transactions

loyalty_earn_points.details: Earns points based on purchase amount with tier multiplier applied

loyalty_redeem_points.details: Validates minimum points, balance check, returns discount_value. Proper 400 error for insufficient points

smart_stock_alerts.details: Returns velocity-based predictions with alerts (critical/warning/info), summary with counts, days_lookback, days_forecast, suggested_order_qty, days_until_stockout

smart_alerts_with_params.details: Custom lookback and forecast periods work correctly

supplier_payment_deletion_bug_fix.details: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Deleting cash/bank payment properly increases supplier credit balance. Response includes supplier_balance_updated: true

supplier_pay_credit.details: Reduces supplier credit balance when paying down credit

supplier_recalculate_balance.details: Recalculates single supplier balance based on credit expenses and payments

basic_stock_alerts.details: Basic min_stock_level based alerts still working

loyalty_page_ui.details: Page loads with Active badge, stats cards (Points Issued: 625, Redeemed: 0, Members: 1, Total Value: SAR 63), Leaderboard tab with ranked customers, All Customers tab with View Loyalty buttons, Settings dialog with tier configuration

smart_alerts_ui.details: Tab shows Critical/Warning/Info/Total alert counts, velocity message 'Based on 30 days consumption, forecasting 7 days ahead', alert cards with item details, suggested order quantity
